line.token: * and select records from users table
user_level, user_session, user_banned, user_signin_count, user_locked_until, login_time
* fetch single value of record by ID
"SELECT ID, user_login, user_email, user_pass, user_level, user_fullname, user_url, user_registered,
"SELECT ID, user_login, user_email, user_pass, user_level, user_fullname, user_url, user_registered,
* retrieving user record based on user_login
"SELECT ID, user_login, user_email, user_pass, user_level, user_fullname, user_url, user_registered,
* retrieving user record based on user_session
"SELECT ID, user_login, user_email, user_pass, user_level, user_fullname, user_url, user_registered,
AND (login_time >= (NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY)) AND user_banned = '0' LIMIT 1"
"SELECT ID, user_email, user_reset_key, user_reset_complete FROM tbl_users
* Modify user record in user table
* to reset password with key sent to user email account
* delete an existing records in user table
* checking whether user_login record does exists
"SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM tbl_users WHERE user_login = ? AND user_banned = '0' LIMIT 1"
"SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM tbl_users WHERE user_session = ? AND user_banned = '0' LIMIT 1"
"SELECT ID FROM tbl_users WHERE user_email = ? AND user_banned = '0' LIMIT 1"
"SELECT user_pass FROM tbl_users WHERE user_email = :user_email AND user_banned = '0' LIMIT 1"
"SELECT user_pass FROM tbl_users WHERE user_login = :user_login AND user_banned = '0' LIMIT 1"
